name: boss
description: China job search — search jobs, job details, company profiles, salary filters, city/industry/position reference data via page-based extraction and API

dependencies.getCities → searchJobs: getCities returns city codes used by searchJobs
dependencies.getPositionCategories → searchJobs: getPositionCategories shows position types used as search keywords
dependencies.getFilterConditions → searchJobs: getFilterConditions returns salary/experience/degree filters for search
dependencies.searchJobs → getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobLink used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getJobDetail → getCompanyProfile: getJobDetail returns companyLink used by getCompanyProfile
dependencies.getCities → getBusinessDistricts: getCities returns cityCode used by getBusinessDistricts
dependencies.getCities → getSubwayStations: getCities returns cityCode used by getSubwayStations
